headline: Erie Indemnity Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
summary: Erie Indemnity Company (NASDAQ: ERIE) today announced financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. Net income was $150.5 million, or $2.88 per diluted share, in the first quarter of 2026, compared to $138.4 million, or $2.65 per diluted share, in the first quarter of 2025.
